entities.name: FINGER MILLET
entities.description: Eleusine coracana L., the target crop species studied for disease resistance genes

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist diseases

entities.name: R-GENES
entities.description: Plant disease resistance genes used as a basis for identifying homologues

entities.name: RESISTANCE GENE HOMOLOGUES
entities.description: Genes in finger millet that are homologous to known plant disease resistance genes

entities.name: POLYMERASE CHAIN REACTION
entities.description: A technique used to amplify DNA fragments, specifically resistance gene homologues

entities.name: DEGENERATE OLIGONUCLEOTIDE PRIMERS
entities.description: Primers designed to conserved regions of the nucleotide binding site for PCR amplification

entities.name: NUCLEOTIDE BINDING SITE
entities.description: A conserved region of R-genes used for primer design

entities.name: BLAST SEARCH
entities.description: A bioinformatics tool used to determine the homology of cloned DNA fragments

entities.name: NBSLRR-TYPE R-GENES
entities.description: A class of R-genes characterized by NBS and LRR domains

entities.name: ECRGHS
entities.description: Eleusine coracana resistance gene homologues identified in finger millet

entities.name: POLLEN SIGNALLING PROTEINS
entities.description: Proteins involved in pollen signalling identified via sequence homology

entities.name: ECPSIPS
entities.description: Eleusine coracana pollen signalling proteins identified in finger millet

entities.name: NON-TIR-TYPE R-GENES
entities.description: A specific type of R-gene characteristic of monocot species

entities.name: MONOCOT SPECIES
entities.description: A group of flowering plants to which finger millet belongs

entities.name: REVERSE TRANSCRIPTION PCR
entities.description: A method used to analyze the expression of ECRGHS from cDNA

entities.name: CDNA
entities.description: Complementary DNA used as a template for reverse transcription PCR

entities.name: DN/DS RATIO
entities.description: The ratio of non-synonymous to synonymous nucleotide substitutions used to analyze selection pressure

entities.name: NBS DOMAINS
entities.description: The nucleotide binding site domains within the RGHs

entities.name: LRR REGION
entities.description: The leucine-rich repeat region of R-genes

entities.name: PURIFYING SELECTION
entities.description: An evolutionary process suggested by the dN/dS ratio in NBS domains

entities.name: MOLECULAR TOOLS
entities.description: Techniques used for the genetic improvement of finger millet
